test_scenarios.given: An IAM user policy with kms:Decrypt action on specific KMS key ARN
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass because Resource is restricted to specific key

test_scenarios.given: An IAM user policy with kms:Decrypt action on all KMS keys (Resource: *)
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because Resource allows all keys

test_scenarios.given: An IAM user policy with kms:ReEncryptFrom action on all KMS keys
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because Resource allows all keys

test_scenarios.given: An IAM user policy with kms:* action on all KMS keys
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because wildcard action with Resource: *

test_scenarios.given: An IAM user policy with multiple statements, one allowing kms:Decrypt on *
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because at least one statement violates the rule

test_scenarios.given: An IAM role policy with kms:Decrypt action on specific KMS key ARN
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass because Resource is restricted

test_scenarios.given: An IAM role policy with kms:ReEncryptFrom action on all KMS keys
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because Resource allows all keys

test_scenarios.given: An IAM group policy with kms:Decrypt action on specific KMS key ARN
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass because Resource is restricted

test_scenarios.given: An IAM group policy with kms:* action on all KMS keys
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because wildcard action with Resource: *

test_scenarios.given: An IAM user policy with Action as array containing kms:Decrypt and Resource as array containing *
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because Resource array contains wildcard

test_scenarios.given: An IAM user policy with S3 permissions only (no KMS actions)
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass because no blocked KMS actions present

test_scenarios.given: An IAM role policy with kms:Decrypt on specific key and Condition element
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass because Resource is specific (Condition is ignored per spec)
